cat /proc/sys/kernel/threads-max; echo "---"; ls /proc/[0-9]*/task 2>/dev/null | wc -l; echo "---"; cat /proc/loadavg
find /proc/[0-9]*/task -maxdepth 0 2>/dev/null | while read d; do pid=$(echo $d | cut -d/ -f3); count=$(ls $d 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$count" -gt 20 ]; then name=$(cat /proc/$pid/comm 2>/dev/null); echo "$count $pid $name"; fi; done | sort -rn | head -20
cat /proc/self/cgroup 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/pids.max 2>/dev/null || echo "no cgroup pids.max"; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/pids.current 2>/dev/null || echo "no pids.current"; echo "---"; ulimit -a 2>/dev/null | grep -i proc
cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/pids.max 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/pids.current 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/user@1000.service/pids.max 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/user@1000.service/pids.current 2>/dev/null
CGROUP=$(cat /proc/self/cgroup | cut -d: -f3); echo "Cgroup: $CGROUP"; cat "/sys/fs/cgroup${CGROUP}/pids.max" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat "/sys/fs/cgroup${CGROUP}/pids.current" 2>/dev/null
cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/user@1000.service/app.slice/app-org.chromium.Chromium-4680.scope/cgroup.procs 2>/dev/null | wc -l; echo "processes"; echo "---"; cat /sys/fs/cgroup/user.slice/user-1000.slice/user@1000.service/app.slice/app-org.chromium.Chromium-4680.scope/cgroup.procs 2>/dev/null | while read pid; do name=$(cat /proc/$pid/comm 2>/dev/null); echo "$pid $name"; done | awk '{print $2}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20
